# rust-proc-status0.1

Compatibility package for the published `proc-status 0.1.1` crate required by
`cli-log 2`. The published crate declares MIT but omits its license file, so the
RPM source adds a packaging-side copy of the standard MIT text. Clean Fedora 43
and Fedora 44 x86_64 mock builds passed, and the package is enabled.
